mission.title: argo: independent version controlled helm values file
mission.description: independent version controlled helm values file. Requested by 101+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
helm list -n argo 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo installation.

steps.title: Review argo configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get configmap -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo
```
followup on #2719 reopening this proposal. The author closed it but I disagree with the conclusion and believe this should still be pursued.

steps.title: Apply the fix for independent version controlled helm values file
steps.description:
# Feature: External Helm values from git

This PR allows for external values.yaml from other git repos in a helm installation. 

**Sample application.yaml**

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: external-test
  finalizers:
    -
```yaml
...
  source:
    repoURL: https://kubernetes-charts.storage.googleapis.com
    chart: my-chart
    targetRevision: 1.0.0
    helm:
      valuesRepo: https://gitlab.com/someproject/path.git
      valuesFiles:
        - values/some/value.yaml
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "independent version controlled helm values file" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
# Feature: External Helm values from git

This PR allows for external values.yaml from other git repos in a helm installation.
codeSnippets:
...
  source:
    repoURL: https://kubernetes-charts.storage.googleapis.com
    chart: my-chart
    targetRevision: 1.0.0
    helm:
      valuesRepo: https://gitlab.com/someproject/path.git
      valuesFiles:
        - values/some/value.yaml

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: external-test
  finalizers:
    - resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io
spec:
  project: default
  source:
    repoURL: https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami
    targetRevision: 8.5.8
    helm:
      valueFiles:
        - values.yaml
      externalValueFiles:
        - repoURL: https://github.com/KaiReichart/argo-test-values.git
          targetRevision: main
          valueFiles:
            - values.yaml
    chart: mysql
  destination:
    server: 'https://kubernetes.default.svc'
    namespace: default

apiVersion: v2
name: cert-manager
version: 1.1.0
type: application
dependencies:
  - name: cert-manager
    version: v1.1.0
    repository: "https://charts.jetstack.io"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo installed or the issue environment reproducible.
